problem id: 9b9b87e3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  00001110 -> 00000111
  00110010 -> 01110111
  01100101 -> 11001110
  01011111 -> 01101011
  10110111 -> 11010111
  11110100 -> 10111110
  00111100 -> 10001111
  11000100 -> 01111100
  10110101 -> 10011111
  01110110 -> 11101110

query: 10111011
predicted answer: 01110111
